audit_items.proof_trace: peci_bus_device_remove contains no memory-freeing operations (no kfree, put_device, or equivalent), so the UAF assertion is vacuously satisfied. All pointers (dev, device, driver) are guaranteed valid by the Linux device model: dev->driver remains set under device_lock in __device_release_driver until after the bus .remove callback returns. After the driver->remove(device) call at line 201, the function immediately exits with no further pointer dereferences.
